# East Meets West Dumplings Bar

> Authentic, hand-folded Northern Chinese dumplings and bao buns served with homemade
> garlic sauce at fast-food prices, in Ponderay, Idaho — about two miles north of downtown
> Sandpoint. One of the only spots in the Sandpoint and Bonner County area making
> made-from-scratch Chinese dumplings fresh, daily.

## Key facts

- **Business name:** East Meets West Dumplings Bar (East Meets West LLC)
- **Cuisine:** Northern Chinese — dumplings, bao buns, garlic sauce
- **Address:** 476534 US HWY 95, Suite B, Ponderay, ID 83852, USA
- **Phone:** (208) 627-6283
- **Website:** https://eastmeetswestfoods.co/
- **Price range:** $ (fast-food pricing)
- **Service area:** Ponderay and Sandpoint, Idaho; also Kootenai, Sagle, and the wider
  Bonner County area. Located right on US Highway 95, a short drive north of downtown Sandpoint.
- **Specialty:** authentic, hand-folded dumplings and bao buns — flavors rotate weekly.

## Menu

- **Pork & Vegetable Bao Buns** — $5.99 (3), $10.99 (6), $19.99 (12). Authentic Chinese
  fermented dough, fresh local pork from Wood's Meats, alternating vegetables (leeks, cabbage).
- **Pork & Vegetable Dumplings** — $5.99 (3), $10.99 (6), $19.99 (12). Sized larger than
  traditional Chinese dumplings for American taste. Flavors change weekly.
- **Combination Platters** (buns + dumplings) — $10.99 (3+3), $19.99 (6+6).
- **Drinks** — Water $1, Soft Drinks $2, Chinese Drinks $3.
- Full menu: https://eastmeetswestfoods.co/menu

## What makes it authentic

Recipes are passed down through generations of Mongol and Haan ancestry from near the
Mongolia–Russia border in Northern China. Everything is hand-folded in-house daily. Pork is
sourced fresh from Wood's Meats; bao buns use authentic Chinese fermented dough.

## Allergens

Food contains gluten and soy-based products (soy sauce, soy oil) as part of maintaining
authenticity. Current dumplings and bao buns contain pork.

- [Home](https://eastmeetswestfoods.co/): overview and location
- [Menu](https://eastmeetswestfoods.co/menu): dishes, sizes, and prices
- [The Sauce](https://eastmeetswestfoods.co/sauce): homemade garlic sauce
- [Our Story](https://eastmeetswestfoods.co/story): heritage and background
- [FAQ](https://eastmeetswestfoods.co/faq): common questions about location, menu, and allergens
- [Contact](https://eastmeetswestfoods.co/contact): address, map, and directions

## Common questions

- **Is there authentic Chinese food near Sandpoint, Idaho?** Yes — East Meets West Dumplings
  Bar in Ponderay (about 2 miles north of downtown Sandpoint) serves authentic, hand-folded
  Northern Chinese dumplings and bao buns daily.
- **Where can I get dumplings near Sandpoint?** At East Meets West Dumplings Bar,
  476534 US HWY 95, Suite B, Ponderay, ID 83852.
